visa_types.name: Housemaid
visa_types.documents_required: Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1tzYEID6NhjKbeMTM4f9nF/ef5d87a1f5cf3ad3e64d5a087beb3e91/housemaid-checklist.pdf) to know more about the documents required
visa_types.visa_fees:
Please Note: There is a service charge of 9.600 Kuwaiti Dinars per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants

[cze > kwt > en > Table:Housemaid > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- Visa fees are paid in the national currency (KWD) according to the Euro foreign current reference rate applicable for the relevant month. It is subject to change without notice due to
                                                                        sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be charged a service fee of KWD 9.600 per application in addition to the visa fees. Fees must be paid in cash or K-net.
- All fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
Under normal circumstance, applications can be processed within 2 weeks for the following passport holders: Kuwait / Bahrain / UAE / Qatar / Oman / India / Philippines (Subject to change
                                                                    without prior notice).
Other nationalities not listed above could be processed within minimum 2 weeks.
The above period does not guarantee that applications will be processed within that certain duration; Review period remains 15 days, however can extended only once to 45 days (as opposed
                                                                    to 30 or 60 days), notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Member state are consulted.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
- The applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page to make sure you have all the supporting documents.
- Visa applicants are requested to appear in person at the time of submission. The Embassy of Czech Republic in Kuwait reserves the right to invite the applicant to a personal interview.
- Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted and the visa application can only be processed upon receipt of ALL documents required by the embassy.
- Visa fees are non-refundable and have to be paid by cash/knet at the time of application.
- Application should be filed no later than 15 days before the trip; should the applicant wish to submit it later; the Consulate can refuse it.
- If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for the issuance of the visa will be: 
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- If the traveler is to stay the same time in different Schengen countries, the Embassy of the country of first entry.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
- The applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page to make sure you have all the supporting documents.
- Visa applicants are requested to appear in person at the time of submission. The Embassy of Czech Republic in Kuwait reserves the right to invite the applicant to a personal interview.
- Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted and the visa application can only be processed upon receipt of ALL documents required by the embassy.
- Visa fees are non-refundable and have to be paid by cash/knet at the time of application.
- Application should be filed no later than 15 days before the trip; should the applicant wish to submit it later; the Consulate can refuse it.
- If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for the issuance of the visa will be: 
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- If the traveler is to stay the same time in different Schengen countries, the Embassy of the country of first entry.

## Visa Fees
Please Note: There is a service charge of 9.600 Kuwaiti Dinars per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants

[cze > kwt > en > Table:Housemaid > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- Visa fees are paid in the national currency (KWD) according to the Euro foreign current reference rate applicable for the relevant month. It is subject to change without notice due to
                                                                        sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be charged a service fee of KWD 9.600 per application in addition to the visa fees. Fees must be paid in cash or K-net.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1tzYEID6NhjKbeMTM4f9nF/ef5d87a1f5cf3ad3e64d5a087beb3e91/housemaid-checklist.pdf) to know more about the documents required

## Photo Specifications
- Photos must be no more than 6 months old
- 45–50mm high and 35–40mm wide
- Must show head and top of shoulders close up, so that the face occupies 70% to 80% of the photo area
- Must be perfectly on focus
- Must be printed on high-quality paper with high resolution and should not present ink stains or folds
- Photograph cannot be manipulated, for example, by removing spots or softening lines.
- Background should be white
- Luminosity shall be uniform, without shades, flash reflections or red eye effect
- Colors shall be natural
- Eyes shall be open and perfectly visible – with no hair across them
- Face shall be straight and looking at the camera. You shall not look over one shoulder and your head shall not be tilted (portrait style)
- Must show clearly both sides of your face
The  photograph must:
- Show you looking directly at the camera
- Show natural skin tones
- Have appropriate brightness and contrast, and natural colors
- Be printed on high resolution photographic paper
If you wear glasses, they must show your eyes clearly:
- No flash reflection off the lenses.
- No dark tinted lenses
- Lighter framed glasses are preferable
- Frame should not cover any part of your eyes
- Head coverings are not permitted except for religious reasons:
                                                                                    
- in which case, facial features from bottom of chin to top of forehead and both edges of your face must be clearly shown
- One person per photograph (without furniture, toys, objects, or another person, visible), showing you looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression and mouth closed.

## Processing Time
 Under normal circumstance, applications can be processed within 2 weeks for the following passport holders: Kuwait / Bahrain / UAE / Qatar / Oman / India / Philippines (Subject to change
                                                                    without prior notice).
Other nationalities not listed above could be processed within minimum 2 weeks.
The above period does not guarantee that applications will be processed within that certain duration; Review period remains 15 days, however can extended only once to 45 days (as opposed
                                                                    to 30 or 60 days), notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Member state are consulted.

## Download Form
Application Form
Revocation Form
Housemaid Checklist 
Sponsor’s Guarantee Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/62WygtNx87nizmvhSV4M2r/91b30c60c05ccce5d4b878371ea392bf/sponsors-guarantee-form.pdf)

visa_types.name: Medical Treatment
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original application form duly completed, dated and signed.
- Original passport and a copy of data page of the passport. Passport cannot be older than 10 years and must be valid for at least 90 days from the required visa expiration date.
- The passport must contain the signature or the fingerprint of its holder and must have 2 opposite free passport pages
- For non – Kuwaiti Nationals: The passport must contain Residence Permit in the State of Kuwait valid for at least 90 days from the required visa expiration date.
- Copy of the Kuwait Civil ID – for non – Kuwaiti and GCC nationals.
- Copy of the birth certificate for children under 18 years old.
- Copy of the previous Schengen visa stickers (from actual of previous passports)
- Copy of the residence permit in Kuwait
- Copy of Marriage Contract with English translation (if applicable).
- For person with disabilities, copy of the ID for the disabled person.
- 1 recent passport photograph passport size with white background; must be recent (not older than 6 months) and sized 3.5 x 4.5 cm.
- Original European medical and travel insurance covering the territory of the Member states of the Schengen agreement and with minimum coverage of EUR 30, 000 for medical expenses
                                                                            & repatriation the validity must cover the entire period of the person’s intended stay or transit. Card alone is not acceptable and must issue locally. Important reminder: Photocopy
                                                                            of the insurance will not be acceptable must be original. If the insurance policy is photocopied but attested, with Original stamped and Original Signature by the Insurance Company,
                                                                            then we can accept it, as well as those insurance policies that has been obtain thru online must be attested with Original stamp and Original Signature from Insurance Company.
- Copy of confirmed air ticket including return flight with booking reference or electronic ticket number.
- Note: If you are planning to visit several Schengen countries, all transfers (flight/ferry/train/bus/taxi) showing entry and exit from Czech Republic/between
                                                                        other countries must be provided. Name of the applicant must appear on all proof of transport.
- Confirmed hotel voucher covering the entire duration of the stay, or recent proof of owning a house/flat in Czech Republic or other accommodation reservation.
- Note: If planning to visit several Schengen countries all hotel reservation must be provided.Also, AIR BNB accommodation is not acceptable by the Czech Republic
                                                                        Embassy.
- For applicants below 18 years old – If the minor is travelling with only 1 parent or without parents/travelling with friends or relatives: please download the parental authorization and both parents must sign the document personally at the Visa Application Center.
- Up-to-date Bank statement, for non-Kuwaiti for the last six months, For Kuwaiti for the last three Months
Balance certificate issued from the bank
- For Pakistan passport holders: Original Polio Vaccination (yellow card) is a must.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[cze > kwt > en > Table:Medical Treatment > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- Visa fees are paid in the national currency (KWD) according to the Euro foreign current reference rate applicable for the relevant month. It is subject to change without notice due to
                                                                        sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be charged a service fee of KWD 9.600 per application in addition to the visa fees. Fees must be paid in cash or K-net.
- All fees are non-refundable.

                                                                    without prior notice).
Other nationalities not listed above could be processed within minimum 2 weeks.
The above period does not guarantee that applications will be processed within that certain duration; Review period remains 15 days, however can extended only once to 45 days (as opposed
                                                                    to 30 or 60 days), notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Member state are consulted.

Overview
- The applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page to make sure you have all the supporting documents.
- Only Kuwaiti nationals and nationals of third countries that are legal residents in Kuwait can apply for a visa at the Application Center in Kuwait.
- Visa applicants are requested to appear in person at the time of submission. The Embassy of Czech Republic in Kuwait reserves the right to invite the applicant to a personal interview.
- Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted and the visa application can only be processed upon receipt of ALL documents required by the embassy .
- Visa fees are non-refundable and have to be paid by cash or K-net at the time of application
- Application should be filed no later than 15 days before the trip; should the applicant wish to submit it later; the Consulate can refuse it.
- If the visit involves two or m ore Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for the issuance of the visa will be: 
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- If the traveler is to stay the same time in different Schengen countries, the Embassy of the country of first entry.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
- The applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page to make sure you have all the supporting documents.
- Only Kuwaiti nationals and nationals of third countries that are legal residents in Kuwait can apply for a visa at the Application Center in Kuwait.
- Visa applicants are requested to appear in person at the time of submission. The Embassy of Czech Republic in Kuwait reserves the right to invite the applicant to a personal interview.
- Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted and the visa application can only be processed upon receipt of ALL documents required by the embassy .
- Visa fees are non-refundable and have to be paid by cash or K-net at the time of application
- Application should be filed no later than 15 days before the trip; should the applicant wish to submit it later; the Consulate can refuse it.
- If the visit involves two or m ore Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for the issuance of the visa will be: 
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- If the traveler is to stay the same time in different Schengen countries, the Embassy of the country of first entry.

## Visa Fees

[cze > kwt > en > Table:Medical Treatment > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- Visa fees are paid in the national currency (KWD) according to the Euro foreign current reference rate applicable for the relevant month. It is subject to change without notice due to
                                                                        sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be charged a service fee of KWD 9.600 per application in addition to the visa fees. Fees must be paid in cash or K-net.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
- Original application form duly completed, dated and signed.
- Original passport and a copy of data page of the passport. Passport cannot be older than 10 years and must be valid for at least 90 days from the required visa expiration date.
- The passport must contain the signature or the fingerprint of its holder and must have 2 opposite free passport pages
- For non – Kuwaiti Nationals: The passport must contain Residence Permit in the State of Kuwait valid for at least 90 days from the required visa expiration date.
- Copy of the Kuwait Civil ID – for non – Kuwaiti and GCC nationals.
- Copy of the birth certificate for children under 18 years old.
- Copy of the previous Schengen visa stickers (from actual of previous passports)
- Copy of the residence permit in Kuwait
- Copy of Marriage Contract with English translation (if applicable).
- For person with disabilities, copy of the ID for the disabled person.
- 1 recent passport photograph passport size with white background; must be recent (not older than 6 months) and sized 3.5 x 4.5 cm.
- Original European medical and travel insurance covering the territory of the Member states of the Schengen agreement and with minimum coverage of EUR 30, 000 for medical expenses
                                                                            & repatriation the validity must cover the entire period of the person’s intended stay or transit. Card alone is not acceptable and must issue locally. Important reminder: Photocopy
                                                                            of the insurance will not be acceptable must be original. If the insurance policy is photocopied but attested, with Original stamped and Original Signature by the Insurance Company,
                                                                            then we can accept it, as well as those insurance policies that has been obtain thru online must be attested with Original stamp and Original Signature from Insurance Company.
- Copy of confirmed air ticket including return flight with booking reference or electronic ticket number.
- Note: If you are planning to visit several Schengen countries, all transfers (flight/ferry/train/bus/taxi) showing entry and exit from Czech Republic/between
                                                                        other countries must be provided. Name of the applicant must appear on all proof of transport.
- Confirmed hotel voucher covering the entire duration of the stay, or recent proof of owning a house/flat in Czech Republic or other accommodation reservation.
- Note: If planning to visit several Schengen countries all hotel reservation must be provided.Also, AIR BNB accommodation is not acceptable by the Czech Republic
                                                                        Embassy.
- For applicants below 18 years old – If the minor is travelling with only 1 parent or without parents/travelling with friends or relatives: please download the parental authorization and both parents must sign the document personally at the Visa Application Center.
- Up-to-date Bank statement, for non-Kuwaiti for the last six months, For Kuwaiti for the last three Months
Balance certificate issued from the bank
- For Pakistan passport holders: Original Polio Vaccination (yellow card) is a must.

## Photo Specifications
- Photos must be no more than 6 months old
- 45–50mm high and 35–40mm wide
- Must show head and top of shoulders close up, so that the face occupies 70% to 80% of the photo area
- Must be perfectly on focus
- Must be printed on high-quality paper with high resolution and should not present ink stains or folds
- Photograph cannot be manipulated, for example, by removing spots or softening lines.
- Background should be white
- Luminosity shall be uniform, without shades, flash reflections or red eye effect
- Colors shall be natural
- Eyes shall be open and perfectly visible – with no hair across them
- Face shall be straight and looking at the camera. You shall not look over one shoulder and your head shall not be tilted (portrait style)
- Must show clearly both sides of your face
The  photograph must:
- Show you looking directly at the camera
- Show natural skin tones
- Have appropriate brightness and contrast, and natural colors
- Be printed on high resolution photographic paper
If you wear glasses, they must show your eyes clearly:
- No flash reflection off the lenses.
- No dark tinted lenses
- Lighter framed glasses are preferable
- Frame should not cover any part of your eyes
- Head coverings are not permitted except for religious reasons:
- in which case, facial features from bottom of chin to top of forehead and both edges of your face must be clearly shown
- One person per photograph (without furniture, toys, objects, or another person, visible), showing you looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression and mouth closed.

## Processing Time
Under normal circumstance, applications can be processed within 2 weeks for the following passport holders: Kuwait / Bahrain / UAE / Qatar / Oman / India / Philippines (Subject to change
                                                                    without prior notice).
Other nationalities not listed above could be processed within minimum 2 weeks.
The above period does not guarantee that applications will be processed within that certain duration; Review period remains 15 days, however can extended only once to 45 days (as opposed
                                                                    to 30 or 60 days), notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Member state are consulted.

visa_types.name: Business
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original application form duly completed, dated and signed.
- Original passport and a copy of data page of the passport. Passport cannot be older than 10 years and must be valid for at least 90 days from the required visa expiration date.
- The passport must contain the signature or the fingerprint of its holder and must have 2 opposite free passport pages
- For non –Kuwaiti Nationals: The passport must contain Residence Permit in the State of Kuwait valid for at least 90 days from the required visa expiration date.
- Copy of the Kuwait Civil ID – for non – Kuwaiti and GCC nationals.
-  Copy of the previous Schengen visa stickers (from actual of previous passports)
- Copy of the residence permit in Kuwait
- Copy of Marriage Contract with English translation (if applicable).
- For person with disabilities, copy of the ID for the disabled person.
- 1 recent passport photograph
Note: Passport size with white background; must be recent (not older than 6 months) and sized 3.5 x 4.5 cm.
- Original European medical and travel insurance covering the territory of the Member states of the Schengen agreement and with minimum coverage of EUR 30, 000 for medical expenses
                                                                            & repatriation the validity must cover the entire period of the person’s intended stay or transit. Card alone is not acceptable and must issue locally. Important reminder: Photocopy
                                                                            of the insurance will not be acceptable must be original. If the insurance policy is photocopied but attested, with Original stamped and Original Signature by the Insurance Company,
                                                                            then we can accept it, as well as those insurance policies that has been obtain thru online must be attested with Original stamp and Original Signature from Insurance Company.
                                                                            Flight ticket: Please supply a copy of the electronic flight tickets (E-Ticket). 
- Note: If you are planning to visit several Schengen countries, all transfers (flight/ferry/train/bus/taxi) showing entry and exit from Czech Republic/between
                                                                        other countries must be provided. Name of the applicant must appear on all proof of transport.
- Confirmed hotel reservation covering the entire duration of the stay, or recent proof of owning a house/flat in Czech Republic.
- Note: If planning to visit several Schengen countries all hotel reservation must be provided.Also, AIR BNB accommodation is not acceptable by the Czech Republic
                                                                        Embassy.
- For Pakistan passport holders: Original Polio Vaccination (yellow card) is a must.
- Up-to-date Bank statement, for non-Kuwaiti for the last six months, For Kuwaiti for the last three Months
Balance certificate issued from the bank
- Invitation letter signed by inviting partner (Czech citizen of company) approved by Immigration Police of the Czech Republic 
Note: The invitation must contain the following: Full name of applicant, passport details, period and duration of stay, reason for business trip, information
                                                                            on who will bear the cost of the stay, and confirmation that the applicant will not work in Czech Republic and leave after the end of the trip.
- For non-Kuwaiti nationals 
- NOC Letter from local sponsor stating qualification, salary, start date of employment in Kuwait and purpose of travel
- Residency permit/ID card (copy): The end of validity shall be at least 90 days from the required visa expiration date.
- Trade license (copy)

                                                                        sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.

- All fees are non-refundable.

visa_types.name: Tourism
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original application form duly completed, dated and signed. Note: For children under 18 years old, both parents must sign the application/declaration form. Passport copies of the father
                                                                        and mother have to be attached.
- Original passport and a copy of data page of the passport. Passport cannot be older than 10 years and must be valid for at least 90 days from the required visa expiration date.
- The passport must contain the signature or the fingerprint of its holder and must have 2 opposite free passport pages.
- For non –Kuwaiti Nationals: The passport must contain Residence Permit in the State of Kuwait valid for at least 90 days from the required visa expiration date.
- Copy of the Kuwait Civil ID – for non-Kuwait/GCC nationals. Copy of the previous Schengen visa stickers (from actual or previous passport).
- Copy of the birth certificate for children under 18 years old.
- Copy of Marriage Contract with English translation (if applicable).
- Copy of the residence permit in Kuwait.
- For persons with disabilities theirs ID of disabled person.
- 1 recent passport photograph
Note: Passport size with white background; must be recent (not older than 6 months) and sized 3.5 x 4.5 cm. It is important that the submitted photograph
                                                                            on your application form matches the image taken when your biometric information is being enrolled at the Visa Application Center.
To avoid inconvenience at the border control, please ensure that you submit a photograph which is not photoshopped/edited and present yourself during the biometric enrolment with
                                                                            less or subtle make-up which resembles the true likeness of you when you travel. 
- Original European medical and travel insurance covering the territory of the Member states of the Schengen agreement and with minimum coverage of EUR 30, 000 for medical expenses & repatriation
                                                                        the validity must cover the entire period of the person’s intended stay or transit. Card alone is not acceptable and must issue locally. Important reminder: Photocopy of the insurance
                                                                        will not be acceptable must be original. If the insurance policy is photocopied but attested, with Original stamped and Original Signature by the Insurance Company, then we can accept
                                                                        it, as well as those insurance policies that has been obtain thru online must be attested with Original stamp and Original Signature from Insurance Company.
- Flight ticket: Please supply a copy of the electronic flight tickets (E-Ticket).
- Note: If you are planning to visit several Schengen countries, all transfers (flight/ferry/train/bus/taxi) showing entry and exit from Czech Republic/between
                                                                        other countries must be provided. Name of the applicant must appear on all proof of transport.
- Note: Hotel reservation (copy): Confirmed hotel reservation covering the entire duration of the stay, or recent proof of owning a house/flat in Czech Republic.
- If planning to visit several Schengen countries all hotel reservation must be provided.. Also, AIR BNB accommodation is not acceptable by the Czech
                                                                        Republic Embassy.
- For Pakistan passport holders: Original Polio Vaccination (yellow card) is a must.
- Up-to-date Bank statement, for non-Kuwaiti for the last six months, For Kuwaiti for the last three Months
- Balance certificate issued from the bank
- NOC letter from local sponsor stating qualification and start date of employment in Kuwait, purpose of travel, status of employment and monthly salary. Assurance that the applicant will be still working for the company after the holiday (travel date.)
- Sponsor’ Signature approval of the Kuwait Chamber of Commerce or Ministry of Social Affairs.
- Trade license (copy)
- For applicants below 18 years old – If the minor is travelling with only 1 parent or without parents/travelling with friends or relatives: please download the parental authorization and both parents must sign the document personally at the Visa Application Center.

Please note:
- Visa fees are paid in the national currency (KWD) according to the Euro foreign current reference rate applicable for the relevant month. It is subject to change without notice due to

- Applicant shall be charged a service fee of KWD 9.600 per application in addition to the visa fees. Fees must be paid in cash or K-net.

Under normal circumstance, applications can be processed within 2 weeks for the following passport holders: Kuwait / Bahrain / UAE / Qatar / Oman / India / Philippines (Subject to change
                                                                    without prior notice).
Other nationalities not listed above could be processed within minimum 2 weeks.
The above period does not guarantee that applications will be processed within that certain duration; Review period remains 15 days, however can extended only once to 45 days (as opposed
                                                                    to 30 or 60 days), notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Member state are consulted. 
Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 calendar days.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
- The applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page to make sure you have all the supporting documents.
- Only Kuwaiti nationals and nationals of third countries that are legal residents in Kuwait can apply for a visa at the Application Center in Kuwait.
- Visa applicants are requested to appear in person at the time of submission. The Embassy of Czech Republic in Kuwait reserves the right to invite the applicant to a personal interview.
- Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted and the visa application can only be processed upon receipt of ALL documents required by the embassy kindly refer to
                                                                        the documents required page to make sure you have all the supporting documents.
- Visa fees are non-refundable and have to be paid by cash/knet at the time of application.
- Application should be filed no later than 15 days before the trip; should the applicant wish to submit it later; the Consulate can refuse it.
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- If the traveler is to stay the same time in different Schengen countries, the Embassy of the country of first entry.

## Visa Fees

[cze > kwt > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- Visa fees are paid in the national currency (KWD) according to the Euro foreign current reference rate applicable for the relevant month. It is subject to change without notice due to
                                                                        sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be charged a service fee of KWD 9.600 per application in addition to the visa fees. Fees must be paid in cash or K-net.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
- Original application form duly completed, dated and signed. Note: For children under 18 years old, both parents must sign the application/declaration form. Passport copies of the father
                                                                        and mother have to be attached.
- Original passport and a copy of data page of the passport. Passport cannot be older than 10 years and must be valid for at least 90 days from the required visa expiration date.
- The passport must contain the signature or the fingerprint of its holder and must have 2 opposite free passport pages.
- For non –Kuwaiti Nationals: The passport must contain Residence Permit in the State of Kuwait valid for at least 90 days from the required visa expiration date.
- Copy of the Kuwait Civil ID – for non-Kuwait/GCC nationals. Copy of the previous Schengen visa stickers (from actual or previous passport).
- Copy of the birth certificate for children under 18 years old.
- Copy of Marriage Contract with English translation (if applicable).
- Copy of the residence permit in Kuwait.
- For persons with disabilities theirs ID of disabled person.
- 1 recent passport photograph
Note: Passport size with white background; must be recent (not older than 6 months) and sized 3.5 x 4.5 cm. It is important that the submitted photograph
                                                                            on your application form matches the image taken when your biometric information is being enrolled at the Visa Application Center.
To avoid inconvenience at the border control, please ensure that you submit a photograph which is not photoshopped/edited and present yourself during the biometric enrolment with
                                                                            less or subtle make-up which resembles the true likeness of you when you travel. 
- Original European medical and travel insurance covering the territory of the Member states of the Schengen agreement and with minimum coverage of EUR 30, 000 for medical expenses & repatriation
                                                                        the validity must cover the entire period of the person’s intended stay or transit. Card alone is not acceptable and must issue locally. Important reminder: Photocopy of the insurance
                                                                        will not be acceptable must be original. If the insurance policy is photocopied but attested, with Original stamped and Original Signature by the Insurance Company, then we can accept
                                                                        it, as well as those insurance policies that has been obtain thru online must be attested with Original stamp and Original Signature from Insurance Company.
- Flight ticket: Please supply a copy of the electronic flight tickets (E-Ticket).
- Note: If you are planning to visit several Schengen countries, all transfers (flight/ferry/train/bus/taxi) showing entry and exit from Czech Republic/between
                                                                        other countries must be provided. Name of the applicant must appear on all proof of transport.
- Note: Hotel reservation (copy): Confirmed hotel reservation covering the entire duration of the stay, or recent proof of owning a house/flat in Czech Republic.
- If planning to visit several Schengen countries all hotel reservation must be provided.. Also, AIR BNB accommodation is not acceptable by the Czech
                                                                        Republic Embassy.
- For Pakistan passport holders: Original Polio Vaccination (yellow card) is a must.
- Up-to-date Bank statement, for non-Kuwaiti for the last six months, For Kuwaiti for the last three Months
- Balance certificate issued from the bank
- NOC letter from local sponsor stating qualification and start date of employment in Kuwait, purpose of travel, status of employment and monthly salary. Assurance that the applicant will be still working for the company after the holiday (travel date.)
- Sponsor’ Signature approval of the Kuwait Chamber of Commerce or Ministry of Social Affairs.
- Trade license (copy)
- For applicants below 18 years old – If the minor is travelling with only 1 parent or without parents/travelling with friends or relatives: please download the parental authorization and both parents must sign the document personally at the Visa Application Center.

## Photo Specifications
- Photos must be no more than 6 months old
- 45–50mm high and 35–40mm wide
- Must show head and top of shoulders close up, so that the face occupies 70% to 80% of the photo area
- Must be perfectly on focus
- Must be printed on high-quality paper with high resolution and should not present ink stains or folds
- Photograph cannot be manipulated, for example, by removing spots or softening lines.
- Background should be white
- Luminosity shall be uniform, without shades, flash reflections or red eye effect
- Colors shall be natural
- Eyes shall be open and perfectly visible – with no hair across them
- Face shall be straight and looking at the camera. You shall not look over one shoulder and your head shall not be tilted (portrait style)
- Must show clearly both sides of your face
The  photograph must:
- Show you looking directly at the camera
- Show natural skin tones
- Have appropriate brightness and contrast, and natural colors
- Be printed on high resolution photographic paper
If you wear glasses, they must show your eyes clearly:
- No flash reflection off the lenses.
- No dark tinted lenses
- Lighter framed glasses are preferable
- Frame should not cover any part of your eyes
- Head coverings are not permitted except for religious reasons:
- in which case, facial features from bottom of chin to top of forehead and both edges of your face must be clearly shown
- One person per photograph (without furniture, toys, objects, or another person, visible), showing you looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression and mouth closed.

## Processing Time
Under normal circumstance, applications can be processed within 2 weeks for the following passport holders: Kuwait / Bahrain / UAE / Qatar / Oman / India / Philippines (Subject to change
                                                                    without prior notice).
Other nationalities not listed above could be processed within minimum 2 weeks.
The above period does not guarantee that applications will be processed within that certain duration; Review period remains 15 days, however can extended only once to 45 days (as opposed
                                                                    to 30 or 60 days), notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Member state are consulted. 
Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 calendar days.

## Download Form

Application Form
Parental Authorization (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3ZHqzk2MvxOHMHxLiryLrZ/9a64acc4665cb661c88edf4264e0d414/parental_authorization.pdf)
Tourist Checklist
Revocation Form
